cases.prompt: 메타랑 구글 광고 돌리고 싶어. 퍼포먼스 마케팅 캠페인 짜줘.

assertions.text: Defines campaign objective (인지/전환/리타겟) and audience design.
Adds creative brief, UTM/conversion tracking, and ROAS/CAC measurement loop.

cases.prompt: Plan a performance-marketing campaign to improve ROAS with retargeting.

assertions.text: Produces a campaign plan as the advertiser (knowledge skill, no backend).
Recognizes this is running ads, NOT serving ads in your own app (ad-monetization).
